Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela A. Underwood, ADA, from the Office of the District Attorney, 415-551-9544, for Petitioner and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted, no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, not reported.

MOTION To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents And Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
